title: Programs related to file handling - Append

content.problemStatement:
You are given an input file - `input.txt`.

Task
You want to append the following values to the file - each value on a new line.
`5
10
abcd
11
12.0
`
Display all contents of the file once done
Update the given function to solve this problem.
content.outputFormat: Print the complete contents of the file "input.txt" after appending the values 5, 10, abcd, 11 and 12.0, each on its own line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The file is initially empty. The program appends the five required lines and then prints the whole file content.

solution.approach: The task does not require any input. Open the file "input.txt" in append mode, write the five required lines (each terminated by a newline), close the file, reopen it in read mode, and output its entire content. To satisfy the platform's convention of handling multiple test cases, perform the whole sequence inside a loop that runs exactly once.
solution.timeComplexity: O(L) where L is the total number of characters written and read (constant for this problem).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used.
